nodes.label: AI as code generation assistant
nodes.grounding_span: AI will be consulted multiple times to either provide solutions to programming problems or to verify and or improve existing code

nodes.label: AI as debugging assistant
nodes.grounding_span: let AI immediately point out what the issue is, rather than possibly spending hours trying to zero in on what is causing the bug

nodes.label: AI as time-saving tool

nodes.grounding_span: I feel that I am already close to being obsolete

nodes.label: AI as holistic big-picture partner
